sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, haystack String, needle String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse - столбцовая система управления базами данных', 'СИСТЕМА');
SELECT hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET needle = 'система' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS result FROM test_strings;
